prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7648名、2026年计划小幅扩招2.3%（推高位次数字）、软科排名上升至第57位（正面声誉，拉低位次数字）、抖音高热关注（推高位次数字）、物理类考生总数略减（拉低位次数字）等多因素，再结合排名上升和考生略减做小幅修正；预测2026年理科最低位次约7725名，区间7225–8225名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 9398 → 8842 → 8060 → 7625 → 7648, showing an overall upward trend. From 2021 to 2024, the cumulative upward shift was about 1773 places, but in 2025, there was a slight downward shift of 23 places compared to 2024, basically stabilizing. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7648. The enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province for science (physics category) was 76 in 2021, 79 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 84 in 2024, and 86 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 88, an increase of 2 (+2.3%) compared to 2025, making competition slightly more intense.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 62nd in 2021 → 64th in 2022 → 64th in 2023 → 68th in 2024 → 63rd in 2025 → 57th in 2026, showing a stable to rising trend in recent years, rising to 57th in 2026, which has a positive impact on the university's reputation. The 2024 reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, involving a teacher ethics survey but without significant negative public opinion. The comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 7th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting high application attention. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. Disciplines: Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Chemistry A-, with a total of 3 A- and above disciplines. The university has distinctive features in chemical engineering and materials, with strong competitiveness in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The main science majors at this university are concentrated in chemical engineering, materials, automation, computer science, etc. Majors like computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering have high social popularity and are recommended, while chemical engineering and materials belong to the broader category of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials, with social popularity ranging from clearly discouraged to generally watched, leading to overall application popularity divergence. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination students in Jilin Province in 2026 is about 110,868. Based on the recent physics category proportion of about 72%, the estimated number of physics category examinees in 2026 is about 79,825, a decrease of about 596 from 80,421 in 2025, slightly easing competition. The provincial control line for the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch is 340 points, slightly lower than 345 points in 2024, with little change in difficulty. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, a popular region. The enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province accounts for a small proportion (about 80+ people), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with limited impact of regional preference on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 7648, a slight expansion of 2.3% in the 2026 plan (pushing the ranking number up), the Soft Science ranking rising to 57th (positive reputation, pulling the ranking number down), high Douyin attention (pushing the ranking number up), and a slight decrease in the total number of physics category examinees (pulling the ranking number down), along with minor corrections based on the ranking rise and examinee decrease, the predicted minimum ranking for science in 2026 is about 7725, with a range of 7225–8225.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 7725, with a range of 7225–8225. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (within about 7500) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Class and Hongde Academy. Candidates with rankings in the middle part of the range (around 7700) should mainly choose Tier 2 experimental classes and dual bachelor's degree programs. Candidates with rankings in the lower part of the range (outside about 8000) are advised to use Tier 3 majors like Advanced Materials and Green Chemistry as safety options. The university's chemical engineering and materials are traditional advantageous disciplines (A/A-), and although their social popularity is average, their disciplinary strength is strong, making them suitable for candidates interested in the fields of chemical engineering and materials.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1854 → 1637 → 1790 → 1641 → 1493, showing an overall fluctuating forward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1493, the best level in the past five years. The consecutive reduction in enrollment significantly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science ranking rose to 57th in 2026, with a stable upward trend in recent years, positively impacting the university's overall reputation. The reputation evaluation in 2024 is neutral/mixed. It ranks 7th in Douyin comprehensive popularity (high heat), but as a science and engineering institution with a small liberal arts enrollment, Douyin heat has limited direct impact on liberal arts applications. The university's liberal arts majors include Law (Excellent Experimental Class), Business Administration, etc. The university's advantageous disciplines (chemical engineering, materials, chemistry) have no direct connection to liberal arts majors, and liberal arts majors lack A-class discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a social popularity ranging from recommended to diverging and cautious, while Business Administration has a social popularity of clearly discouraged. The provincial control line for the 2025 history category undergraduate batch is 384 points, an increase of 15 points from 369 in 2024, indicating a slight increase in difficulty. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, a popular region. The university enrolls only 9–12 liberal arts students in Jilin Province, a very small cross-provincial enrollment, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1493, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 10% (significantly lowering the ranking number, easing competition), the rise in Soft Science ranking (positive reputation, lowering the ranking number), and the roughly flat total number of history category candidates (neutral impact), along with minor adjustments for ranking increases, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for liberal arts is about 1383, with a range of 1134–1632.
